summary: Iteration 105 testing completed. All requested features verified: 1) Document Bundle export works - dialog opens, documents can be selected, PDF generation endpoint returns 200. 2) Timeline delete buttons visible on mobile (opacity-100 class applied). 3) Notes delete buttons visible and functional. 4) Footer 'NOT LEGAL ADVICE' disclaimer visible on all pages (landing, how-it-works, appeal-statistics, case detail). 5) Report View has disclaimer. 6) Barrister View has prominent red disclaimer banner (data-testid='barrister-disclaimer-banner'). 7) Tab print preview and Timeline print preview HTML include disclaimer boxes (verified in source code).
seed_data_creation: N/A - used existing test case case_a97ea91f0692
context_for_next_testing_agent: All fixes from iteration 105 verified: 1) Bundle PDF export fixed (variable shadowing bug in export.py line 619 - 'doc' renamed to 'pdf_doc'). 2) Timeline delete button opacity fixed (opacity-100 md:opacity-0 md:group-hover:opacity-100). 3) Disclaimers added to all print/export views. Test case case_a97ea91f0692 has 8 documents, 8 timeline events, 3 notes, and 3 reports including rpt_bef09b0d9664.
